core_mechanism: Construction of Gaussian (coherent, minimum-uncertainty) states on the quotient of a phase space by a non-abelian symmetry group, obtained by averaging over the group orbit to project onto the symmetry-invariant subspace, where the sharpness of the peak in the reduced invariant variables is governed by the geometry and singular (degenerate-orbit / fixed-point) loci of that quotient.
brief_reason: The abstract builds symmetry-invariant coherent states whose overlaps are Gauss-peaked in invariant quantities, except at degenerate orbits where the invariant configuration space is singular and the peak flattens into a plateau, identifying coherent-state peaking on a symmetry-group quotient whose behavior is controlled by that quotient's singularities.
